tuning: E A D G B E
content:
LeAnn Rimes - I Need You

Intro:
[ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]C9[/ch]
[ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]C9[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch]


Ohh da da dat da..
[ch]G[/ch] - [ch]D/F#[/ch] (or [ch]D[/ch]) - [ch]C9[/ch] (x2)

Verse 1:

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  I don't need a lot of things[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C9[/ch] (or [ch]C[/ch])
I can get by with nothin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
With all the blessings life can bring[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C9[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]
I've always needed something[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Bm7[/ch]                   
But I've got all I want when it comes to lovin' you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                    [ch]C9[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]
You're my only reason, you're my only truth[/tab]


[chorus]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]C9[/ch]
I need you like water, like breath, like rain[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C9[/ch]
I need you like mercy from Heaven's gate[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]C9[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
There's a freedom in your arms, that carries me through[/tab]

I need you

(Intro part, ta da dat da.. X2)

Verse 2

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
  You're the hope that moves me[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C9[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
To courage again, oh yeah[/tab]

You're the love that rescues me
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C9[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]
When the cold winds rage[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]Bm7[/ch]                  [ch]Am7[/ch]
And it's so amazin' cause that's just how you are[/tab]

And I can't turn back now
[tab]             [ch]C9[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Cause you've brought me too far[/tab]



[Repeat chorus]
I need you like water, like breath, like rain
I need you like mercy from Heaven's gate
There's a freedom in your arms, that carries me through

[tab]        [ch]G[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]Em[/ch]
I need you[/tab]

[tab]          [ch]C9[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch] - [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]C9[/ch] - [ch]C/D[/ch] (or [ch]D[/ch])
Oh, yes I do, oh[/tab]


Repeat chorus:
I need you like water, like breath, like rain
I need you like mercy from Heaven's gate
There's a freedom in your arms, yeah, that carries me through
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]C9[/ch]
I need you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]Am7[/ch] - [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]C9[/ch] - [ch]C/D[/ch] (or [ch]D[/ch])
Oh, yes I do[/tab]

I need you

oh, oh, oh

I need you, oh-oh

(Fade)


(I'll leave the rest for you to figure out, it's not hard)

-bootyman
